summary: Comprehensive testing of HR User Creation/Deletion feature. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified: Create User dialog with all fields, Super Admin sees edit/key/delete buttons, HR sees 'View only' text.
seed_data_creation: Created test users with prefix 'test_user_creation_' during API testing. All cleaned up in teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: User creation/deletion feature fully implemented. Super Admin can create/edit/delete any user. HR can create users (except super_admin/hr roles) but cannot edit/delete. Frontend correctly shows 'View only' text for HR users on Roles & Credentials tab.

super_admin_create_user.details: Creates user with email/password/role. Returns user_id, email (lowercased), role, name, is_active

super_admin_create_super_admin_role.details: Super Admin can create users with super_admin role

super_admin_create_hr_role.details: Super Admin can create users with hr role

hr_create_regular_user.details: HR can create users with regular roles (accountant, site_engineer, etc.)

hr_cannot_create_super_admin.details: HR gets 403 when trying to create super_admin role

hr_cannot_create_hr.details: HR gets 403 when trying to create hr role

password_mismatch_validation.details: Returns 400 with 'Passwords do not match' message

email_uniqueness_validation.details: Returns 400 with 'already exists' message for duplicate email

super_admin_delete_user.details: Super Admin can delete users, verified with GET /api/hr/users

hr_cannot_delete_user.details: HR gets 403 when trying to delete users

login_with_new_user.details: Newly created user can login with email/password, session works with /api/auth/me

missing_fields_validation.details: Returns 400 for missing email, password, or role

ui_create_user_dialog.details: Dialog has all 7 fields: Employee Link, Name, Email, Role, Password, Confirm Password, Submit

ui_super_admin_action_buttons.details: Super Admin sees Edit(30), Key(30), Delete(30) buttons on user rows

ui_hr_view_only.details: HR sees 'View only' text instead of action buttons, can see Create User button
